meta.name: Spec Generation Enrichment
meta.description: Enable rich spec generation with lightweight entities, reusable references, and feature-specific metadata

action.name: Enrich Feature Specs
action.description: Generate rich feature specifications with metadata, components, operations, and references

component.name: Reference Renderer
component.description: Helper methods for rendering TypeScript, signatures, and other reference types

component.name: Metadata Accessor
component.description: Helper for accessing meta.feature_specs and other metadata sections

component.name: Spec Generator
component.description: Enhanced SpecGenerator class with helper methods for rich spec generation

task.name: Render TypeScript
task.action:
Implement Render TypeScript:
Component: Reference Renderer Helper methods for rendering TypeScript, signatures, and other reference types
Operation: Convert data-model reference to TypeScript interface
TODO: Add specific implementation guidance with library choices and constraints.
task.done: Render TypeScript implemented and verified. CHECKPOINT: Human reviews implementation.

task.name: Render Signature
task.action:
Implement Render Signature:
Component: Reference Renderer Helper methods for rendering TypeScript, signatures, and other reference types
Operation: Format function signature reference as readable string

task.done: Render Signature implemented and verified. CHECKPOINT: Human reviews implementation.

task.name: Get Feature Metadata
task.action:
Implement Get Feature Metadata:
Component: Metadata Accessor Helper for accessing meta.feature_specs and other metadata sections
Operation: Access meta.feature_specs for a feature with graceful degradation

task.done: Get Feature Metadata implemented and verified. CHECKPOINT: Human reviews implementation.

Implement Get Component File:

task.name: Generate Rich Feature Spec
task.action:
Implement Generate Rich Feature Spec:
Component: Spec Generator Enhanced SpecGenerator class with helper methods for rich spec generation
Operation: Enhanced feature spec generation with all new sections and metadata

task.done: Generate Rich Feature Spec implemented and verified. CHECKPOINT: Human reviews implementation.
